positive: A stylized, central composition featuring a mystical forest animal, perhaps a luminous fox or a sleek raven, nestled among abstract botanical elements and geometric crystalline structures. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern graphic design, emphasizing deep, saturated jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted against rich matte blacks and metallic gold accents. The animal should have clean, strong silhouette edges. The overall composition must be highly detailed, repeating, and perfectly balanced for seamless repeating print application on apparel. Studio lighting, high contrast, minimal depth of field effect, isolated subject on a clean background.
negative: blur, lowres, bad anatomy, messy, grunge, noisy, artifact, watermark, logo, text, cropped, excess details, extra limbs, ugly, out of frame
